name: briefs
description: Daily Slack briefs — morning, throughout-the-day poll, and EOD. Calendar + Gmail + Zoom required; Jira, HubSpot, and additional tools optional. Offers to do follow-up work for you with explicit approval.

plugins.name: briefs
plugins.description: Three automated Slack briefs (morning, poll, EOD) with a work-offer approval loop. Pulls from Calendar, Gmail, Zoom; optional Jira, HubSpot, and any other tools you connect.
